title: dfflibmap: fix next_state inversion propagation for DFF flops by inve…
body: Fix #5445 like #5190. Propagating the negation of a next_state through a flop requires inverting the reset value. Previously, I fixed this for DFFSR by swapping the S and R pins. For DFF, we have to fix this by flipping the reset value in the type that a PDK flop will match, for example, from `_DFF_PN0_` to `_DFF_PN1_`. This PR comes with a formal test that fails prior to this PR.
